name: Knob Recorders
description: This algorithm is an intrinsic part of the Performance Page (above). It is implemented as an algorithm so that clocks can be routed into it via busses, and so that the user can choose how much memory to allocate to the knob recorders from the pool available to the preset.

specifications.name: Time
specifications.description: The total amount of knob recorder time.

parameters.name: Page select
parameters.description: When this parameter changes, it changes the current page in the Performance Page custom UI. This will be most useful when mapped to a MIDI CC, for example, so you can remotely control the visible page.

parameters.name: Time
parameters.description: Scales the amount of time allocated to this item from the available total (as set in the specification).

parameters.name: Clock source
parameters.description: Sets the clock source for this item: one of ‘None’, ‘Clock input’, or ‘MIDI’.

parameters.name: Divisor
parameters.description: The MIDI clock divisor, if the ‘Clock source’ is ‘MIDI’.

parameters.name: Clock multiplier
parameters.description: A multiplier applied to the clock source.

input_ports.name: Reset input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for a reset pulse, to reset the clock dividers to step 1.

input_ports.name: Clock input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for the clock, if the ‘Clock source’ is ‘Clock input’.
